title: Add AI img gen stant to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Dialing in the pixels
gist.blurb: A fresh community app just sprouted in the greenhouse. 'AI img gen stant' gives you fine-grained control over style, resolution, and seeds for your next masterpiece.
gist.summary: Added the 'AI img gen stant' app to the community showcase, offering a new interface for text-to-image generation with advanced parameter controls.
gist.impact: Creators have a new community-built tool to generate, tweak, and export images with precise control over resolution and styling.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about a new community app for image generation with control over style, resolution, and seeds. Visuals: Polly the bee adjusting dials on a retro machine that produces pictures, representing the fine-grained control. The Monitor Robot holding the finished picture.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot adjusting chunky dials on a retro lime green (#ecf874) machine that is printing out a beautiful pixel landscape. A cute chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head holds the finished picture, screen showing happy square eyes. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites, nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
